title: PortfolioKPIRecord
description: Extracted KPIs and financials from a board deck or LP update. doc_id is the ingestion document ID.

doc_id.description: Unique document identifier injected by the extractor.

reporting_period.description: Quarter and year of the report, e.g. 'Q3 2024'.

arr_usd.description: Annual Recurring Revenue in USD (no currency symbol).

mrr_usd.description: Monthly Recurring Revenue in USD (no currency symbol).

arr_growth_yoy_pct.description: ARR year-over-year growth as a percentage, e.g. 85.0 for 85%.

burn_rate_monthly_usd.description: Net monthly cash burn in USD.

runway_months.description: Cash runway in months as of the reporting date.

ndr_pct.description: Net Dollar Retention as a percentage, e.g. 118.0 for 118%.

key_milestones.description: Key milestones achieved in the reporting period.

notable_risks.description: Risks or concerns raised in the document.
